title: conversion of string values to an interval second column is implemented incorrect and incomplete
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE INTERVAL_TBL_2 (f1 INTEGER NOT NULL, f2 TEXT);
INSERT INTO INTERVAL_TBL_2 (f1, f2) VALUES (CAST('2 days 3 hours' AS INTEGER), 'valid interval');
INSERT INTO INTERVAL_TBL_2 (f1, f2) VALUES (CAST('31536000' AS INTEGER), 'another valid interval');
INSERT INTO INTERVAL_TBL_2 (f1, f2) VALUES (NULL, 'invalid interval');
SELECT f1, f2 FROM INTERVAL_TBL_2 WHERE f1 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Incorrect conversion of string values to interval second
